dc_description: A landscape view of a quiet orchard or grove with rows of mature trees, likely olive trees, forming a grassy path through the center. The ground is uneven with dry grass, small wildflowers, and patches of bare soil. On the left is a small shed or box-like structure with a red roof and blue door, partly surrounded by branches and vegetation. On the right is a bright yellow boat or boat-shaped object resting on supports beneath the trees. A wooden bench is visible deeper in the grove near the center-right. The image has muted, slightly grainy colors with dense foliage filling most of the frame.
novel_visual_observations: The yellow boat stands out as the most saturated object in an otherwise subdued green-gray orchard. Several tree trunks are twisted and gnarled, with silvery leaves creating a textured canopy across the upper half of the image.
location_name: Via Dante Alighieri, Le Coste, Montefiascone
rich_context: Poste Italiane, 19, Via Dante Alighieri, Le Mosse, Le Coste, Montefiascone, Viterbo, Lazio, 01027, Italia
